ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract summarizing the publication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was created */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of research task (e.g., theoretical, empirical) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, published) */,
  "revision_count" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the publication */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the full-text article file */,
  "supplementary_materials" TEXT /* JSON array of supplementary materials (e.g., datasets, code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., University name) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* JSON array of research interests */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the author's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author-publication association */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the author's contribution to the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category to support hierarchical categories */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the category to use in visualizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_categories" (
  "pub_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-category association */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_categories_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, reviewer, admin) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* JSON array of research interests */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the publication */,
  "confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the reviewer in their review (1-5) */,
  "rebuttal" TEXT /* Rebuttal from the authors to the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication making the citation */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation was made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., in-text, footnote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication for which metrics are recorded */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the publication */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the publication */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the publication */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication was shared */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_tags" (
  "pub_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-tag association */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_tags_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
